name: Sourdough Rolled Chocolate Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour and salt in a bowl.
2. Add the softened shortening, sugar, egg, rum, vanilla extract, and sourdough starter to the flour mixture.
3. Incorporate the melted chocolate into the dough.
4. Beat until smooth.
5. Fold in the oatmeal, beating well.
6. Chill for about 1 hour in the refrigerator.
7. Roll out on a lightly floured surface to 1/8 inch thick.
8. Cut with a cookie cutter and place on an ungreased cookie sheet.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 10 to 12 minutes.
